name: Arizona Diamonds & Gold
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop and precious metals buyer in Phoenix specializing in gold, diamonds, watches, and jewelry. Offers same-day cash payments with 30+ years of industry experience.
description_long:
Arizona Diamonds & Gold is a family-owned pawn shop located at 1703 E. Indian School Road in Phoenix, Arizona. The business has been operating with a team that collectively brings over 30 years of experience in the pawn and gold-buying industry across multiple states. The company positions itself as a specialist buyer rather than a generalist pawn operation, with particular expertise in high-end precious metals and luxury goods assessment.

The company offers a range of services centered on buying and pawning items of value. Their primary focus includes purchasing gold (all karats from 10-24), platinum, diamonds, and fine jewelry. They also buy high-end watches from luxury brands including Rolex, Omega, Breitling, Cartier, Hublot, and Patek Philippe. Additionally, they purchase designer handbags, musical instruments, silver, estate jewelry, and other items of value. All transactions involve on-the-spot cash payment with no obligation to sell after evaluation.

The company distinguishes itself through several specific claims: expert appraisal capability that justifies paying "top dollars" for items, a simple transparent process with free evaluation and certification, no pressure sales model, and immediate cash payment. They emphasize accessibility by accepting walk-ins and appointments, and note they can identify item types and quality for customers unfamiliar with their possessions. Their family-owned status and multi-state experience are presented as indicators of reliability and expertise.

A realistic assessment shows Arizona Diamonds & Gold operates as a legitimate specialized pawn and precious metals buyer with credible operational claims based on their website. However, the company provides no pricing information, APR disclosures (relevant if offering loans), licensing information, or customer reviews on their website. For consumers considering pawn loans rather than outright sales, terms and conditions are absent. The business model inherently favors the buyer in valuation, and consumers should expect market-based pricing rather than premium valuations regardless of claims.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers same-day cash payments on the spot for sold items with no waiting period
Provides free evaluation and certification of items without obligation to sell
Specializes in high-end watches from luxury brands (Rolex, Omega, Breitling, Cartier, Patek Philippe, etc.)
Buys all karats of gold (10, 14, 18, 24) including broken jewelry and bars
Family-owned business with 30+ years combined industry experience across multiple states
Accepts walk-ins and appointments with no pressure sales model
Services include gold, platinum, diamonds, designer handbags, instruments, and estate jewelry
cons: No pricing, valuation formulas, or fee schedule disclosed on website
No licensing, bonding, or credential information provided for customer verification
No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials available on their website
If offering pawn loans, no APR, terms, or loan conditions are disclosed
No published buying process standards or valuation methodology transparency
best_for: Individuals looking to sell inherited or unused jewelry, watches, or precious metals for immediate cash
Luxury watch owners seeking quick liquidation of high-end timepieces from premium brands
People with gold or platinum items (broken, worn, or complete pieces) seeking rapid cash evaluation
diagnosis: Best for individuals with precious metals, luxury watches, or jewelry who need immediate cash and want expert evaluation without sales pressure. Main caveat: the company discloses no pricing methodology, terms for loans, licensing credentials, or independent reviews, so consumers should independently verify reputation and obtain competitive quotes before transacting.
services: Buy gold jewelry (rings, chains, bracelets, charms in all karats)
Buy platinum jewelry and platinum bars
Buy broken gold and broken jewelry of any kind
Buy high-end watches (Rolex, Omega, Breitling, Cartier, Hublot, Patek Philippe, and others)
Pawn loans on items of value
Free evaluation and certification of precious metals and jewelry
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1703 E Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85016
